Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • compartment_id - (Required) (Updatable) The OCID of the compartment that contains the VBS instance.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource. Each key is predefined and scoped to a namespace.
  • display_name - (Required) (Updatable) Service instance display name.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource. Each tag is a simple key-value pair with no predefined name, type, or namespace.
  • idcs_access_token - (Required) IDCS personal access token identifying the VBS service administrator user.
  • is_resource_usage_agreement_granted - (Optional) (Updatable) Whether VBS is authorized to create and use resources in the customer tenancy.
  • name - (Required) Service instance name. This unique identifier cannot be changed.
  • resource_compartment_id - (Optional) (Updatable) Compartment where VBS may create additional resources for the service instance.
